metrics.gap_rate_pct: (approved_budget_k minus verified_spend_k) divided by approved_budget_k times 100
metrics.incident_rate_per_1000: analysis late_reports divided by profile scale_denominator times 1000
metrics.compliance_risk_score: weighted normalized gap rate, gap-rate change, incident rate, and criticality

normalization: Min-max normalize each component across active entities before applying weights.
display_rounding: Round percentages, percentage-point changes, rates, and scores to one decimal.
